chapter_title: Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
text:
(1) A person commits the offense of misuse of a program placard if the person:

(a) Is the driver of a vehicle that is being used as part of a program for the transportation of persons with disabilities; and

(b) Uses a program placard described under ORS 811.607 (Program placards) for any purpose other than exercising privileges granted under ORS 811.637 (Privileges granted by program placards) .

(2) Except as provided in subsection (3) of this section, misuse of a program placard is a Class C traffic violation.

(3) A second or subsequent conviction for misuse of a program placard is a Class A traffic violation. [1983 c.338 §682; 1987 c.187 §4; 1989 c.243 §10; 2001 c.367 §4; 2007 c.70 §339; 2011 c.597 §101]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 811. Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
##### § 811.630 — Misuse of program placard

(1) A person commits the offense of misuse of a program placard if the person:

    (a) Is the driver of a vehicle that is being used as part of a program for the transportation of persons with disabilities; and

    (b) Uses a program placard described under ORS 811.607 (Program placards) for any purpose other than exercising privileges granted under ORS 811.637 (Privileges granted by program placards) .

(2) Except as provided in subsection (3) of this section, misuse of a program placard is a Class C traffic violation.

(3) A second or subsequent conviction for misuse of a program placard is a Class A traffic violation. [1983 c.338 §682; 1987 c.187 §4; 1989 c.243 §10; 2001 c.367 §4; 2007 c.70 §339; 2011 c.597 §101]

A second or subsequent conviction for misuse of a program placard is a Class A traffic violation. [1983 c.338 §682; 1987 c.187 §4; 1989 c.243 §10; 2001 c.367 §4; 2007 c.70 §339; 2011 c.597 §101]
